## High-Risk Path Review

Check this box if the PR touches `src/hook/`, `bin/hook.ts`, `src/config/`, `src/matcher/`, `package.json`, `.github/workflows/`, or release docs.

- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] `npm run audit:public` passed
- [ ] Manual self-review completed
- [ ] PR comment includes review summary
